name: Dashboard Page
description: A personalized landing page for workers showing key metrics, urgent items, and upcoming tasks. Provides at-a-glance status and quick access to priority work items.
whenToUse: As the default landing page after login for worker applications
To show personalized summary of the user's workload
When users need quick access to urgent or time-sensitive items
To surface important metrics and trends

structure.greeting: Personalized welcome with user's first name
structure.statsRow: Key metrics (total cases, urgent, due soon, overdue)
structure.urgentSection: Cards for urgent items requiring immediate attention
structure.upcomingSection: Cards for items due in the next 7 days

utilities.isOverdue: Check if date is past due
utilities.isDueSoon: Check if date is within threshold (default 3 days)
utilities.getStatusBadgeProps: Map status to badge type and content
utilities.getPriorityBadgeProps: Map priority to badge type and content

example.description: Complete dashboard page for case management

variants.name: With notifications section
variants.description: Add a recent notifications or alerts section

variants.name: With quick actions
variants.description: Add action buttons for common tasks (Create case, Search)

variants.name: Team dashboard
variants.description: Show team-wide stats instead of personal workload

considerations: Personalize with user's first name for friendly greeting
Use color-coded stats sparingly (only for concerning numbers)
Limit card lists to 3-5 items with 'View all' for more
Cards should be clickable with clear hover states
Consider empty states for each section
Stats should be clickable to navigate to filtered views
